name: ai-programming-platform
description: Root scripts for Docker and smoke tests

scripts.up:all: npm run up:judge0 && npm run up
scripts.down:all: npm run down && npm run down:judge0
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec backend npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec backend npm run prisma:seed
scripts.setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
